name: RevenueOS Core
description: AI-powered revenue operations platform that unifies pipeline data, forecasting, and deal intelligence across CRM, email, and calendar. Gives RevOps teams a single source of truth.
ideal_customer: B2B SaaS companies with 50-500 employees and a dedicated sales team looking to reduce revenue leakage.

name: SignalStream
description: Real-time buyer intent signal aggregator. Monitors job postings, funding news, tech stack changes, and executive moves to surface high-propensity accounts for outbound teams.
ideal_customer: Outbound-heavy sales teams at growth-stage B2B companies wanting to prioritize their TAM with data-driven signals.

name: DataBridge Sync
description: No-code data pipeline builder that connects SaaS tools (CRM, ERP, data warehouses) with bi-directional sync, automated transformations, and anomaly alerts.
ideal_customer: Ops and engineering teams at mid-market companies drowning in spreadsheet exports and one-off ETL scripts.

name: ComplianceGuard
description: Automated compliance monitoring for SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, and GDPR. Continuously maps controls to evidence, auto-generates audit reports, and flags gaps.
ideal_customer: Fast-growing SaaS companies preparing for enterprise deals or regulated-industry verticals needing continuous compliance posture.

name: PulseEngage
description: Continuous employee engagement platform with pulse surveys, manager coaching nudges, and retention risk scoring powered by NLP sentiment analysis.
ideal_customer: People Ops teams at remote-first or hybrid companies with 100+ employees facing engagement and retention challenges.

name: CloudLens FinOps
description: Multi-cloud cost observability and optimization engine. Provides per-team showback, anomaly detection, right-sizing recommendations, and commitment buying intelligence.
ideal_customer: Engineering and finance leaders at cloud-native companies spending $50K+/month on AWS, GCP, or Azure.

name: LearnForge AI
description: AI content authoring and LMS platform that auto-generates course modules from existing documentation, SOPs, or expert videos. Tracks skills gaps against role requirements.
ideal_customer: L&D teams at enterprises or high-growth scaleups with rapid headcount growth and outdated training content.

name: ThreatLens SIEM
description: AI-assisted threat detection and investigation platform. Correlates signals across cloud, endpoints, and identity to surface high-fidelity alerts. Slashes mean-time-to-detect by 60%.
ideal_customer: Security teams at mid-enterprise companies with 200-2000 employees outgrowing legacy SIEM tools or evaluating Splunk alternatives.

name: RouteIQ
description: Last-mile delivery optimization engine using ML to dynamically route drivers, predict ETAs, and rebalance loads in real time. Integrates with major WMS and TMS platforms.
ideal_customer: Logistics and supply chain companies with 50+ delivery drivers or warehouse operations seeking 15-30% cost reduction.

name: InsightBoard
description: Embedded analytics SDK and no-code dashboard builder for SaaS products. Lets non-technical users build live reports from any data source in minutes without SQL.
ideal_customer: Product and ops teams at B2B SaaS companies that want to embed analytics in their product or replace BI tools their users don't actually open.

name: FieldSync Mobile CRM
description: Offline-first mobile CRM for field sales teams. Auto-logs calls and visits, captures GPS check-ins, and syncs to Salesforce or HubSpot when connectivity returns.
pain_points_solved: CRM data entry burden on reps
ideal_customer: Field sales teams of 10-200 reps in industries like medical devices, construction, or consumer goods with spotty connectivity on the road.

name: PaymentPulse
description: Intelligent payment retry engine and revenue recovery platform for subscription businesses. Uses ML to predict optimal retry timing, reducing involuntary churn by up to 40%.
ideal_customer: SaaS and subscription companies with $1M+ ARR experiencing 5-15% monthly revenue loss due to failed payments and weak dunning sequences.

name: AgriSense Platform
description: End-to-end precision agriculture platform combining satellite NDVI imagery, IoT soil sensors, and ML yield forecasting. Delivers actionable field-level recommendations to agronomists.
pain_points_solved: sensor data reliability in rural areas
ideal_customer: Mid-to-large agricultural operations and agronomy service providers managing 5,000+ acres seeking data-driven crop management.

name: OnboardIQ
description: Structured employee onboarding automation. Creates personalized 30-60-90 day plans, auto-assigns tasks across HR/IT/manager, and tracks completion with nudge reminders.
ideal_customer: HR and People Ops teams at fast-growing companies hiring 10+ people per month who need to scale onboarding without adding headcount.

name: NexusAPI Gateway
description: Managed API gateway with built-in rate limiting, auth, analytics, and versioning. Deploy in one click to any cloud. Replaces Kong or AWS API Gateway for teams that want simplicity.
ideal_customer: Engineering teams at growth-stage companies exposing internal or external APIs and needing enterprise-grade control without the operational overhead.
